title: Hundred Finance - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to donate large amounts of WBTC to the empty hWBTC contract, manipulating the exchange rate. A guard could have detected and blocked the transaction by monitoring for a flash loan followed by a call to donateToReserves().
